name: Tourtiere IV
recipeIngredient: 1 large Potato - Boil and mash, saving the water it was cooked in
1/4 tsp Each Cloves and Dry Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil and mash the potato, then save the water it was cooked in.
2. In a large frying pan, combine the pork, onion, garlic, and seasonings with the reserved potato water.
3. Simmer for 25 minutes.
4. Stir in the mashed potato.
5. Cool the mixture and place it in a pastry-lined pie plate.
6. Cover with the top crust.
7. Bake in a 450°F oven for 10 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat and lower to 350°F for an additional 20 minutes.
